```

# xorg.conf (xorg X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by failsafeDexconf, using

### Post by Ub1476 on 2007-12-08
Make sure your graphic drivers is installed. Also you can try to reinstall the Ubuntu-desktop:

```
sudo apt-get install ubuntu-desktop --reinstall

```

### Post by jvc26 on 2007-12-08
You could reconfigure your xserver with:
```

sudo dpkg --reconfigure xserver-xorg

```
Which is what I used to do if it got properly broken.
Il
